provenance.source: Manually verified calculation using BondFactor NSS baseline parameters
provenance.method: Hand-computed cashflow discounting cross-verified against bootstrapped zero curve pricing. Documented transparently as manual calculation, not authoritative market quote, per Testing Strategy §4.

benchmarks.reference_source: Manually verified: cashflows discounted at bootstrapped zero rates from NSS(7.2, -1.5, 2.0, -0.8, 1.5, 6.0). Not a market quote.
benchmarks.expected_discrepancy_notes: Short-dated bond priced off a smooth fitted curve. Real traded prices may differ by 1-5 bps due to repo specialness, auction supply dynamics, and bid-ask spread. This is within the expected range for default-free, liquidity-agnostic valuation.

benchmarks.reference_source: Manually verified: cashflows discounted at bootstrapped zero rates from NSS(7.2, -1.5, 2.0, -0.8, 1.5, 6.0). Not a market quote.
benchmarks.expected_discrepancy_notes: 5-year benchmark sits near the belly of the curve where NSS curvature factors are most active. Liquidity premium for on-the-run vs off-the-run 5Y can be 2-8 bps.

benchmarks.reference_source: Manually verified: cashflows discounted at bootstrapped zero rates from NSS(7.2, -1.5, 2.0, -0.8, 1.5, 6.0). Not a market quote.
benchmarks.expected_discrepancy_notes: 7-year point tests the transition region between medium and long-term curve behavior. Fitting residuals at this tenor are typically small (< 3 bps).

benchmarks.reference_source: Manually verified: cashflows discounted at bootstrapped zero rates from NSS(7.2, -1.5, 2.0, -0.8, 1.5, 6.0). Not a market quote.
benchmarks.expected_discrepancy_notes: 10-year benchmark is the most liquid Indian G-Sec tenor. Actual traded clean prices may deviate by 5-15 bps from model due to demand/supply technicals and flight-to-quality flows. Model prices off fitted par curve, not individual security microstructure.

benchmarks.reference_source: Manually verified: cashflows discounted at bootstrapped zero rates from NSS(7.2, -1.5, 2.0, -0.8, 1.5, 6.0). Not a market quote.
benchmarks.expected_discrepancy_notes: Ultra-long bond is most sensitive to the long-end asymptote (beta0). Illiquidity premium for 30Y GOI paper can be 10-25 bps above the fitted curve. Large duration magnifies small yield discrepancies into meaningful price differences.
